create-aiida-profile: if verdi profile list 2>/dev/null | grep -qv '^Report:'; then echo 'AiiDA profile already exists, skipping creation. Run `verdi profile list` to see it.'; else verdi presto --use-postgres; fi
install-pseudos: aiida-pseudo install pseudo-dojo -r SR -f upf || true
aiida-pseudo install pseudo-dojo -r FR -f upf || true
echo "Pseudo potentials should be installed. To check them, run: aiida-pseudo list"
echo "To install from a folder, run: aiida-pseudo install family <folder_name> <label_you_want> -P pseudo.upf"
echo "To install from a folder and then setup cutoffs (the best procedure), please read the documentation of aiida-pseudo."
